arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers explains what he's not buying into about Dinamo Zagreb ahead of Celtic game
arts.sum: Speaking about Dinamo Zagreb already picking up seven points in the competition, Rodgers said that’s exactly the reason why he’s paying no attention to the Croat’s domestic form ahead of playing his Celtic side. With rumours that Zagreb is in ‘crisis’ ahead of playing Celtic, Rodgers explains why he isn’t buying into the Croatian side’s poor domestic from heading into the game tonight.

arts.ttl: Dinamo Zagreb 'struggling with injuries' as six stars drop out ahead of Celtic visit
arts.sum: Dinamo Zagreb have been stricken with injuries ahead of hosting Celtic in the UEFA Champions League on Tuesday evening

arts.ttl: Dinamo Zagreb vs Celtic LIVE score and goal updates from the Champions League clash in Croatia
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers knows a win in Croatia will all but guarantee them a playoff place in UEFA’s elite competition

arts.ttl: 'Outstanding'... Kris Boyd admits Celtic have a 'luxury' player who should start vs Dinamo Zagreb
arts.sum: But it seems that Kris Boyd reckons Celtic have a player in midfield who could and probably should be in with a shout of starting against Dinamo Zagreb tonight as the former Rangers striker admits he’s been ‘outstanding’ this season for Rodgers. Kris Boyd says Celtic midfielder Luke McCowan should start vs Dinamo Zagreb

arts.ttl: John Higgins has something 'terrible' to say about Celtic boss Brendan Rodgers as snooker star issues fan fess up
arts.sum: The Hoops fan admits the boss has left hm to 'eat humble pie'

arts.ttl: Alexandro Bernabei earns prestigious spot in Brazil as £8m Celtic defender's future trajectory changes
arts.sum: Alexandro Bernabei did not exactly set the heather alight at Celtic before he left the club on loan. Now the Argentinian international hopeful has earned a significant honour with his loan club having been named in Brazilian Serie A’s team of the season.

arts.ttl: Croatian media on Celtic: 'Sometimes you concede seven, sometimes you score five'
arts.sum: Croatian media has identified one key part of Celtic's gameplan that Dinamo Zagreb must monitor

arts.ttl: Callum McGregor ribs Celtic's 'Peter Pan' as Hoops captain nears European milestone vs Dinamo Zagreb
arts.sum: Speaking ahead of the important Champions League fixture, McGregor was asked about the record as the Celtic captain admits the milestone has just crept up on him. Celtic’s Champions League fixture against Dinamo Zagreb will be McGregor’s 100th European tie for the club.

arts.ttl: Daniel Cummings nets Youth League stunner as in-demand Celtic teen's red hot form continues against Dinamo Zagreb
arts.sum: The prolific teenager has continued his sensational form in the UEFA Youth League, but it wasn't enough for the Hoops to avoid defeat

arts.ttl: I played my best football at Celtic - the supporters are greatest in the world
arts.sum: Mark Viduka insists Celtic have the greatest fans in the world.
